faqs_items.question: Do you provide full source code after delivery?
faqs_items.answer: Yes. FastX.ink commits to a complete handover of Git repository access, deployment scripts, and all technical documentation — no technical lock-in.

faqs_items.question: Can the system scale if our business grows?
faqs_items.answer: Absolutely. Our 'Instant Architecture' is container-native, supporting elastic scaling. From 1,000 to 100,000 DAUs, scalability is built-in.

faqs_items.question: How do you price your services?
faqs_items.answer: We use tiered fixed-price quotes based on feature complexity and estimated hours. No low-ball entry with hidden costs later.

items.title: Reshaping Global New Retail: A Top Fresh Produce E-Commerce Cloud Ecosystem

items.title: Industry 4.0 Benchmark: A Manufacturer's Cloud IoT Management Hub
items.summary: The digital nervous system for industrial hardware. Via data processing and cloud modeling, managers can view real-time 3D twins of 10,000+ machines from any browser.

about.desc: FastX.ink Studio was founded with a singular purpose: to deliver digital assets that truly reshape markets, using world-class software engineering.
about.vision_title: An unrelenting pursuit of absolute code quality and minimalist aesthetics.
about.vision_p1: In an era of throwaway software outsourcing, we choose to be different. We believe great code is like a precision V8 engine — built to be fast, stable, and scalable. And UI design is the luxurious interior; it should make you fall in love at first sight.
about.vision_p2: From Silicon Valley architecture thinking to top design systems, we bring the world's best practices to every partner — completely reshaping your digital competitive advantage.
about.team_desc: We're not just developers — we're your business partners. FastX brings together architects with cross-border enterprise experience and principal designers who pursue the perfect balance.
